caption: The video features a man speaking at an event hosted by the United States Institute of Peace, as indicated by the backdrop. He is dressed formally in a dark suit, white shirt, and tie, with a name tag on his lapel. The man appears to be engaged in delivering a speech or presentation, using hand gestures for emphasis. His expressions and movements suggest he is making a point or explaining a concept, likely addressing an audience off-camera. The setting suggests a professional and formal atmosphere, typical of academic or diplomatic discussions.
